query: Make this existing DatoCMS plugin config screen feel native to DatoCMS: tighten the spacing, group settings into sections, and use datocms-react-ui where it helps.
Restyle this DatoCMS plugin sidebar panel with raw CSS so it matches the DatoCMS UI density, borders, and typography.
Redesign this DatoCMS asset source results screen so it looks like a native DatoCMS work area instead of a generic dashboard.
Polish this DatoCMS plugin modal so the form, helper text, and actions follow the CMS design system.
Patch this existing DatoCMS plugin page and make the resulting UI feel native to DatoCMS without changing the feature behavior.
Scaffold a new DatoCMS plugin with a config screen and make the initial UI feel native to DatoCMS.
Patch this existing DatoCMS plugin's executeItemFormDropdownAction so it clears the slug field and leave the current UI alone.
Create a brand-new DatoCMS plugin project with Vite, React, and a connect() entrypoint.
Write a DatoCMS CMA script that bulk publishes all draft records in a model.
Set up DatoCMS draft mode and visual editing in this Next.js app.
Add a new renderModal hook to this existing DatoCMS plugin and keep the current UI structure as-is.
